title: Gas Hydrate and Free Gas Concentrations in Two Sites inside the Chilean Margin (Itata and Valdivia Offshores)
abstract: Two sectors in the Chilean margin—Itata (~37°S) and Valdivia (~40°S) offshores—were analysed using seismic data to characterize gas hydrate concentrations. Maximum hydrate concentration reaches 17% of total volume in both sectors. Strong lateral velocity variations show a maximum value in Valdivia offshore (2380 m/s above the BSR) and a minimum below in Itata offshore (1380 m/s below BSR). Geothermal gradients range from 32–87 °C/km in Itata and ~35 °C/km in Valdivia.

location.description: Two sites on the Chilean margin: Itata offshore (~37°S) and Valdivia offshore (~40°S)

seismic_lines.name: RC2901-727 — Itata offshore (~37°S); R/V Conrad RC2901, Jan–Feb 1988
SO161-29 — Valdivia offshore (~40°S); R/V SONNE SO161 SPOC, Jan–Feb 2001

data.name: MCS Profiles — Itata and Valdivia Offshores (37°S and 40°S)
data.description: MCS reflection profiles at Itata (~37°S) and Valdivia (~40°S) offshore Chilean margin analyzed for BSR-based gas hydrate and free gas quantification; velocity model shows hydrate concentrations up to 17% of total volume. [SPOC cruise (SO161, 2001) datasets searchable on PANGAEA]

data.name: Navigation:Primary
data.description: acquired during the Robert D. Conrad expedition RC2901 (1988)

_data_note: MDPI open access paper. Uses legacy MCS seismic data from Chilean margin, likely from SPOC/GEOMAR cruises.

processing.summary: Velocity analysis (NMO-based and PSDM) was applied to MCS reflection profiles at two Chilean margin sites (Itata ~37°S and Valdivia ~40°S) to derive velocity models for gas hydrate and free gas quantification. Maximum hydrate concentration is 17% at both sites. Geothermal gradient derived from BSR depth ranges from 32–87°C/km at Itata and ~35°C/km at Valdivia.
workflow: 5. Gas hydrate and free gas concentration estimation
software: Seismic Unix (SU v43R8, CWP Golden CO)
processing.notes: RC2901-727 (Itata ~37°S): 3000m streamer, 240 ch, 12.5m intertrace, 10 airguns, 61.3L=3741cui, 50m shot spacing. SO161-29 (Valdivia ~40°S): 3000m streamer, 132 ch (1-24: 12.5m, 25-132: 25m), source volume not stated in page 3 (same array as other SO161 lines: 20 airguns, 54.1L=3302cui). MDPI open access paper.

analysis_notes: Validated against PDF. 3 authors confirmed correct. vessel: 'R/V SONNE' only → added 'R/V Conrad (RC2901)' + cruise IDs. year_acquired: null → 1988. streamer_length_m: null → 3000. channel_count: null → 132 (SO161)/240 (RC2901). software: 'Echos/unknown' → Seismic Unix SU v43R8. seismic_lines: named RC2901-727 (Itata) and SO161-29 (Valdivia).
